_meta.title: Subscription Management Module Specification
_meta.purpose: Complete production-ready specification for subscription lifecycle management including plans, billing cycles, discounts, and automated renewal logic
instructions: Generate TypeScript types from all entity fields
Generate Zod schemas for all form inputs
Implement all flows with the exact API calls listed
All billing cycle generation happens server-side only
MRR and ARR are always computed and never stored directly
Proration logic must be implemented server-side with the formula: (days_remaining / days_in_cycle) * cycle_amount
Discount redemption_count must be incremented atomically at application time
Use Socket.io events to push real-time subscription state changes to connected clients

entities.name: Plan
entities.description: Defines a subscription offering with pricing, interval, and feature set

fields.name: version
fields.notes: Optimistic lock version — incremented on every UPDATE

db_constraints.name: chk_subscription_plans_deleted_order
db_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints.name: chk_subscription_plans_currency_len
db_constraints.expression: char_length(currency) = 3 WHERE currency IS NOT NULL

components.name: TagInput
components.description: Input that allows creating and removing string tags
components.behavior: Enter or comma to add tag. Click X to remove. Shows autocomplete suggestions if provided.
components.tailwind: flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 p-2 bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md

components.name: TagList
components.behavior: Renders tags as badges. Shows +N more if exceeds maxVisible.

components.name: PlanCard
components.description: Card displaying plan details: name, price, interval, features
components.behavior: Renders plan info with pricing prominently. Checkmark icon when selected.
components.tailwind: border border-slate-700 rounded-xl p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-blue-500 transition-colors

components.name: PlanSelector
components.description: Grid of PlanCards for selecting a subscription plan
components.behavior: Fetches active public plans. Renders as PlanCard grid. Highlights selected plan.

components.name: SubscriptionStatusBadge
components.description: Status badge for subscription lifecycle states
components.behavior: Maps status to colors. Shows 'Cancels at period end' indicator if cancel_at_period_end is true.
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

components.name: BillingCycleTable
components.description: Table listing billing cycles for a subscription with status and invoice links
components.behavior: Fetches and renders billing_cycles ordered by cycle_number desc. Shows retry button for failed cycles.

components.name: TrialBadge
components.description: Badge showing trial status and days remaining
components.behavior: Only visible when status = 'trialing'. Shows days remaining or 'Trial ended'.
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-purple-900 text-purple-300

components.name: SeatCounter
components.description: Display showing current and max seats for a subscription
components.behavior: Shows N seats or N / max seats with progress bar if maxSeats is set.

components.name: DiscountBadge
components.behavior: Renders discount code and value. Green background.
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-green-900 text-green-300 text-xs

components.name: UpgradeDowngradeModal
components.description: Modal for changing subscription plan with proration preview
components.behavior: Shows current plan vs new plan comparison. Displays proration amount. Allows choosing immediate or end-of-period effective date.
components.tailwind: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center

components.name: CancellationModal
components.description: Modal for cancelling a subscription with reason and timing options
components.behavior: Presents cancel immediately vs cancel at period end. Requires reason text. Shows when access will end.
components.tailwind: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center

components.name: SubscriptionTimeline
components.description: Visual timeline of subscription events: created, trialing, activated, upgraded, cancelled
components.behavior: Vertical timeline with event type icons and timestamps. Color-coded by event type.
components.tailwind: space-y-3 relative before:absolute before:left-3 before:top-0 before:bottom-0 before:w-px before:bg-slate-800

components.name: PriceDisplay
components.description: Displays subscription price with interval (e.g., $49.00 / month)
components.behavior: Formats price and appends interval label. Handles custom intervals.

components.name: IntervalBadge
components.behavior: Maps interval to human-readable label (Monthly, Quarterly, Annual, etc.).
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 text-xs

components.name: FeatureList
components.description: Bulleted list of plan features with checkmark icons
components.behavior: Renders feature strings with green checkmark icons. Expandable if maxVisible set.

components.name: DataTable
components.tailwind: w-full border border-slate-800 rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-slate-900

components.name: StatusBadge
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

components.name: CurrencyInput
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white font-mono

components.name: SlideOverForm
components.tailwind: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 flex flex-col bg-slate-900 border-l border-slate-800 shadow-2xl z-50

components.name: ConfirmationDialog
components.tailwind: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center

components.name: EmptyState
components.behavior: Centered empty state with optional CTA.
components.tailwind: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-center

components.name: PageHeader
components.description: Page header with title, breadcrumbs, actions
components.tailwind: sticky top-0 z-10 bg-slate-950 border-b border-slate-800 px-6 py-4

components.name: FilterPanel
components.behavior: Inline filter inputs with active count badge.

components.name: TextInput
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white

components.name: NumberInput
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white font-mono

components.name: Toggle
components.tailwind: relative inline-flex h-5 w-9 cursor-pointer rounded-full

components.name: Textarea
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white resize-none

components.name: YesNoBadge
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

components.name: NotificationBell
components.behavior: Bell icon with unread count. Popover list.

endpoints.description: List all active subscription plans
Create a new subscription plan
Get a single plan by ID
Update a plan. Price changes do not affect existing subscriptions current_price.
endpoints.optimistic_description: Update plan in list cache immediately

endpoints.description: Soft-delete a plan. Blocked if active subscriptions exist.
List subscriptions with filtering
Create a new subscription. Server sets status based on trial_days. Auto-creates first billing_cycle.
Get a single subscription with plan and customer details

response_schema.data: Subscription & { plan: Plan, customer: Customer, discount: SubscriptionDiscount | null }

endpoints.description: Update subscription seats or metadata
Cancel a subscription immediately or at period end
Pause a subscription, suspending billing cycle generation
Resume a paused subscription
Change subscription plan with optional proration. Creates new billing_cycle for proration amount if immediate.
List all billing cycles with filtering
Get all billing cycles for a specific subscription
Manually retry a failed billing cycle attempt
Waive a billing cycle, marking it as not requiring payment
List subscription discounts
Create a new discount
Get a single discount
Update a discount
Soft-delete a discount. Blocked if applied to active subscriptions.
Apply a discount code to an active subscription. Increments redemption_count atomically.

stores.name: authStore
stores.description: Authenticated user, organization, token, and permissions

stores.name: uiStore
stores.description: Global UI state for modals, slide-overs, and toasts

stores.name: subscriptionStore
stores.description: Active subscription detail and upgrade/downgrade modal state

events.description: Emitted when trial ends and subscription becomes active. Triggers subscription cache invalidation.
Emitted when subscription is cancelled. Updates subscription status in UI.
Emitted when subscription moves to past_due after max billing attempts.
Emitted when a billing cycle charge attempt fails. Triggers retry scheduling.
Emitted when a billing cycle is successfully paid. Updates billing history.
Emitted 3 days before trial end. Used for in-app and email notifications.

flows.name: Create Subscription
flows.description: Create a new subscription for a customer, optionally with trial and discount

steps.ui: Choose plan using PlanSelector grid. PlanCard shows price, interval, features.
steps.action: Form field update, current_price auto-populated from plan.price

steps.ui: Set seats, current_period_start. current_period_end auto-calculated from interval.

steps.action: Client-side discount preview, server validates on submit

steps.ui: Server creates subscription and auto-generates first billing_cycle server-side
steps.action: Backend: if plan.trial_days > 0: status=trialing, trial_start=now, trial_end=now+trial_days else status=active

steps.ui: Redirect to /subscriptions/:id. TrialBadge visible if trialing.

journal_entry_side_effects: On first paid billing cycle: DR Accounts Receivable, CR Deferred Revenue (for prepaid period) or CR Revenue (for current period)

flows.name: Recurring Billing Automated Job
flows.description: Automated cron job that generates invoices and attempts charges for due billing cycles

steps.ui: No UI — server-side scheduled job (daily cron)
steps.action: SELECT billing_cycles WHERE status=pending AND period_end <= CURRENT_DATE AND deleted_at IS NULL
POST /invoices with subscription customer and billing_cycle amount
If success: billing_cycle.status=paid, subscription.status=active, socket emit billing_cycle.paid
billing_cycle.attempt_count += 1, next_retry_at = now + retry_interval, socket emit billing_cycle.failed

steps.ui: On success, generate next billing_cycle for next period
steps.action: INSERT billing_cycles for next period based on billing_interval

cross_entity_updates: subscription.current_period_start and current_period_end advanced on success

flows.name: Upgrade or Downgrade Plan
flows.description: Change subscription plan with proration calculation

steps.ui: Select new plan from PlanSelector. Modal shows current vs new price, proration preview.
Choose effective: Now or End of Period
Server updates subscription.plan_id and current_price. If effective=now and prorate=true, creates adjustment billing_cycle.

cross_entity_updates: new billing_cycle created for proration if applicable
journal_entry_side_effects: Proration credit or charge posted to next invoice

flows.name: Cancel Subscription
flows.description: Cancel subscription immediately or at end of billing period

steps.ui: Select: Cancel immediately OR Cancel at end of period. Enter optional reason.
If immediate: status=cancelled, access ended immediately, no further billing cycles.
steps.action: Backend: set cancelled_at=now, status=cancelled, clear pending billing_cycles

steps.ui: If cancel_at_period_end: status remains active, cancel_at_period_end=true. CancellationBadge shown.
steps.action: Backend: set cancel_at_period_end=true, subscription continues until current_period_end

computed_fields.formula: current_price / interval_months WHERE interval_months: monthly=1, quarterly=3, semi_annual=6, annual=12, custom=interval_count
IF type = 'percentage' THEN cycle_amount * value / 100 ELSE value

domain_rules.api_guard: When cancel_at_period_end=true, subscription remains active and billable until current_period_end
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show 'Cancels on [date]' banner on subscription detail. Do not show 'cancelled' badge until effective.

domain_rules.rule: Subscription becomes past_due after 3 consecutive failed billing attempts
domain_rules.api_guard: Scheduled retry job checks attempt_count >= 3 and sets status=past_due, emits socket event
domain_rules.ui_behavior: SubscriptionStatusBadge shows past_due with amber color. Prompt to retry payment.

domain_rules.rule: Discount redemption_count must not exceed max_redemptions
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate redemption_count < max_redemptions before applying. Use SELECT FOR UPDATE to prevent race condition.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable discount code input if discount is exhausted. Show error message.
domain_rules.db_constraint: CHECK (max_redemptions IS NULL OR redemption_count <= max_redemptions)

domain_rules.rule: Trial period cannot be extended after subscription is active
domain_rules.api_guard: Return HTTP 422 if attempt is made to set trial_end when status != 'trialing'
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Trial date fields are read-only in subscription detail view

domain_rules.rule: Downgrade cannot take effect mid-cycle if proration is disabled
domain_rules.api_guard: If prorate=false and effective=now for a downgrade, reject with HTTP 422 directing user to set effective=period_end
domain_rules.ui_behavior: UpgradeDowngradeModal disables 'Now' option for downgrades when proration is disabled in org settings

domain_rules.rule: subscription_number must be unique within org
domain_rules.api_guard: Server generates subscription_number and never accepts it from client
domain_rules.ui_behavior: subscription_number is display-only, never shown in create form

constraints: subscription_number MUST be auto-generated server-side and never accepted from client
First billing_cycle MUST be auto-created server-side when a subscription is POST-ed, never from client
MRR and ARR computations MUST always be derived from current_price and billing_interval at runtime, never stored
UpgradeDowngradeModal MUST show a proration preview before confirmation, computed client-side as (days_remaining / days_in_cycle) * price_difference
CancellationModal MUST clearly display when access will end based on the selected cancellation mode
EVERY mutation MUST implement onMutate, onError, and onSettled for optimistic updates
SubscriptionStatusBadge MUST read colors from constants/statusColors.ts
Discount redemption MUST use a database transaction with SELECT FOR UPDATE to prevent race conditions
BillingCycleTable retry button MUST be visible only to roles with billing_cycles.retry permission
Trial-ending WebSocket event MUST trigger an in-app notification visible via NotificationBell
AuthGuard MUST wrap all routes and check feature-level permissions

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id

external_entity_refs.name: Invoice
external_entity_refs.description: Invoice generated for a billing cycle. Full definition in invoice_billing_spec.
